title: Kernelについて、soul.mdもしくはphilosophy.mdを作るべきか？方法としてはobsidianにある情報を抽出して作成する。マルチエージェント・オーケストレーションで点数化して評価せよ
summary_text: BLOCKED requested action: harden the `philosophy.md` worldview integration under strict Kernel orchestration for the residual work boundary (`live re-verification` plus `smoke test` planning) active lanes: - `Codex-main`: loaded [`AGENTS.md`](/Users/masayuki/AGENTS.md) and [`CODEX.md`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/CODEX.md), built the base requirements packet - `Gemini-cli`: produced a usable plan; recommendation was `smoke suite for the 4 patched skills + one targeted live re-verification` missing lanes: - `GLM`: unavailable in the current run; `command -v glm` returned no executable - `Copilot`: unavailable in the current run; `copilot -p` failed with `ERR_DLOPEN_FAILED` because `node-pty` is `x86_64` while this host requires `arm64` exact reason: the `/kernel` contract requires 3-model planning diversity. In this run I can sustain only `Codex + Gemini-cli`, so continuing would silently degrade below the required quorum. continuity note: if quorum is restored, the best next packet is `add a minimal smoke suite for the 4 patched skills, then do one targeted live re-verification on the highest-risk skill`.
